title: Flashlight
description: TCT Flashlight is a mod that adds several means of lighting, lantern, flashlight, headlamp, dynamic light
body:
FLASHLIGHT+ 


adds advanced handheld and wearable light tools to improve your night survival and exploration experience
Ideal for traveling in darkness, exploring caves or walking through creepy abandoned places
Designed to offer immersive lighting while keeping gameplay balanced

![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/052173cd589206df9f22409e5d5b296e1c018e00.png)
![logo]

Light up your adventures and never fear the dark again
This mod adds

![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7e489f3a8583dedfa5c631f3d039564699078c7.png)

Flashlight
A directional light beam that follows where you look
Recharge by right-clicking while holding a battery

Headlamp
Hands-free lighting for mining and adventuring at night
Recharge by placing the headlamp with a battery inside an anvil

Lantern
A continuous warm light source you can hold or place
Cannot be recharged once drained

Night Vision Goggles 
See clearly in complete darkness without placing any light


⚠️ Dependencies
Requires TCTCore (V5.2+) Link download
